caption: A man wearing a dark green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" printed in white is speaking into a professional microphone. He is seated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and various clothing racks visible in the background. The walls are decorated with several framed photographs. Two logos are visible on the screen: a circular logo on the left featuring the text "OFF THE RECORD" and a red logo on the right that reads "BODLY FLY TOT". As the scene progresses, the man continues talking, slightly shifting his facial expressions and head position while maintaining his gaze toward someone off-camera. The background remains static, and his attire and the surrounding equipment do not change throughout the sequence.
